name: Neto by Maropost Release Notes – 6 Aug 2019
body: [{"type":"p","children":[{"text":"Release Version","bold":true},{"text":": 6.64"}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":""}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Minor Features","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Xero via OneSaas sales orders can be sent as date invoiced or sent as date completed (dispatched)."}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"You can now create or update all products for MYOB AccountRight, Xero, and Saasu into Neto."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]},{"type":"h2","children":[{"text":"Bug Fixes","bold":true}]},{"type":"ul","children":[{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"An issue was found in last week's "},{"text":"Auto enlarge main product image","bold":true},{"text":" fix. This has been corrected so that images above 500 x 500 px won't raise an error."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed an issue where editing a product review date didn't save correctly."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"type":"lic","children":[{"text":"Fixed a bug where only a single consignment was displaying on a sales order that had multiple consignments."}]}]},{"type":"li","children":[{"text":"Unsupported browser versions will display a warning message on the control panel login page."}]}]},{"type":"p","children":[{"text":" "}]}]
